name: Privilege Escalation - Bypassing User Account Control
description: Detection of a process attempting to bypass User Account Control (UAC) to escalate privileges. Adversaries may bypass UAC to execute malicious code with elevated permissions without triggering a UAC prompt. This detection is based on the behavior of known UAC bypass techniques.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the UAC bypass attempt at `{timestamp}` on host `{hostname}`. The process `{process_name}` with Process ID `{process_id}` was involved in the attempt to bypass UAC. Analyze the command line (`{command_line}`) for any suspicious arguments and review the user (`{user}`) associated with the activity. Determine the UAC bypass technique used. Provide a summary of your findings and recommend immediate mitigation steps to prevent this type of privilege escalation.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname where the UAC bypass attempt was detected.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process involved in the UAC bypass attempt.

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: The Process ID of the process involved in the UAC bypass attempt.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line of the process involved in the UAC bypass attempt.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.
